import React, { Component } from 'react' import c from './workers.module.scss' import { periods } from '../../utils' import { Components } from '..' const FinancesTable = () => { const [ month, setMonth ] = React.useState() const [ period, setPeriod ] = React.useState(1) const [ active, setActive ] = React.useState(false) React.useEffect(() => { const date = new Date() const month = date.toLocaleString('ru', { month: 'long' }) setMonth(month.slice(0, 1).toUpperCase() + month.slice(1)) }, []) return (
